audio_clips.text: So here she is introducing herself to her viewers.
She then introduces the main topic of her video which is a 5 minute makeup challenge.
She then tells her viewers that this makeup look is good for if you're running late or trying to get to work or school in time without all the hassle of doing a full face of makeup.
Right here she is showing us her phone to prove that she is actually setting a 5 minute timer before she starts her makeup look.
Right here she is brushing her right eyebrow with a brow brush.
She then moves on to her left eyebrow and continues to brush that one.
He is now going to apply this concealer under her right eye.
She now moved on to her left eye and is going to apply the concealer under there.
You'll see here that she is going to apply the concealer in between her brows and then move on to her forehead where she applies it over her brows and in her general forehead area.
Lastly, for the concealer, she is going to apply it in her chin area, specifically right under her lip.
As you can see here, she is blending out all of the concealer all over her face with a blending foundation brush.
She is now going to apply this powder all over her face with a foundation brush and while she looks into a little mirror in front of her.
Here she is showing the finished product of the powder on her face as she winks at her audience.
Here she is going to show us a bronzer that she is going to use and she is going to apply this right under her cheekbones with a bronzer brush.
As I just said, she is applying this bronzer right under her cheekbones with a big fluffy brush.

She is now showing us a highlighter that she is going to use. She is going to apply this right in the area that she applied the bronzer a little bit above her cheekbones with a thinner brush called a highlighter brush.
As you can see, she is stroking the brush right above the area that she put the bronzer.
She is now going to proceed to put the highlighter on the tip of her nose and then you will see she will move on to putting the highlighter right above her upper lip.
She then points to the specific shade that she is going to use.
She is now applying the blush to her cheekbones.
She is now curling her right eye eyelashes as she's looking into a mirror and you'll see that she'll move on to her left eye.
She is showing us a lip color that she is going to use on her lips.
You will see that she is going to apply this lip color right on her lower lip and then blend it out to her upper lip.
As she finishes her makeup look, she removes her hair from behind her ears.
As you can hear, their timer went off, which indicates that she did complete the 5 minute makeup challenge in time.
She is now showing us her timer to prove that she did complete the challenge in time.
She is now going to spray her face with a setting spray and then show us what specific setting spray she likes to use.
She then ends her video with saying goodbye to her subscribers and telling her viewers to subscribe to her channel And then you'll see she's going to follow at the end of her video with some bloopers
As you can see, the clips keep changing, showing the different times that she maybe messed up or stumbled upon her words as she was recording her video.
